---
title: "SMS Spam Classification"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document: default
date: "2025-10-08"
---

```{r}
# Load libraries
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(caret)
library(textstem)
library(tm)
library(wordcloud)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(text2vec)
library(glmnet)
library(xgboost)
library(Matrix)
library(pROC)
library(kableExtra)
library(SnowballC)
library(tensorflow)
library(keras)
library(keras3)

```


Data Cleaning
```{r}
# Read and clean data
sms_data <- read.csv("spam.csv") %>%
  distinct() %>%
  select(v2, v1) %>%
  rename(text = v2, label = v1) %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("ham", "spam"), labels = c(0, 1)))

data <- sms_data %>%
  mutate(text = text %>%
           str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z@]", " ") %>%
           str_squish() %>%
           str_to_lower() %>%
           str_replace_all("@", "twacc") %>%
           lemmatize_strings() %>%
           removeWords(stopwords("en")))

# Check data
dim(data)
head(data)

```

Exploratory Data Analysis
```{r}
# Distribution of Ham vs Spam
ggplot(data, aes(x = label, fill = label)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Ham vs Spam")

# Word clouds side by side
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
wordcloud(words = unlist(strsplit(paste(data$text[data$label==0], collapse = " "), " ")),
          max.words = 100, scale = c(3,0.5), random.order = FALSE, colors = brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
wordcloud(words = unlist(strsplit(paste(data$text[data$label==1], collapse = " "), " ")),
          max.words = 100, scale = c(3,0.5), random.order = FALSE, colors = brewer.pal(8, "Set1"))

top_words <- data %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text) %>%
  count(label, word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(label) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 30) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(word = reorder_within(word, n, label))

ggplot(top_words, aes(x = n, y = word, fill = factor(label))) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ label, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  labs(title = "30 Most Common Words per Label", x = "Frequency", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal()

```

Train-Test Split
```{r}
set.seed(123)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(data$label, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
test_data <- data[-train_idx, ]

y_train <- as.numeric(as.character(train_data$label))
y_test <- as.numeric(as.character(test_data$label))

```
Document-Term Matrix
```{r}
# Create DTM
it_train <- itoken(train_data$text, tokenizer = word_tokenizer, progressbar = FALSE)
vocab <- create_vocabulary(it_train) %>% prune_vocabulary(term_count_min = 10)
vectorizer <- vocab_vectorizer(vocab)
dtm_train <- create_dtm(it_train, vectorizer)

it_test <- itoken(test_data$text, tokenizer = word_tokenizer, progressbar = FALSE)
dtm_test <- create_dtm(it_test, vectorizer)
```


XGBoost Grid Search
```{r}
x_train <- as.matrix(dtm_train)
x_test <- as.matrix(dtm_test)

train_df <- as.data.frame(x_train)
train_df$label <- factor(ifelse(train_data$label == 1, "spam", "ham"), levels = c("ham", "spam"))
y_test_factor <- factor(ifelse(test_data$label == 1, "spam", "ham"), levels = c("ham", "spam"))

xgb_grid <- expand.grid(
  nrounds = c(50, 100),
  max_depth = c(3, 6),
  eta = c(0.05, 0.1),
  gamma = 0,
  colsample_bytree = c(0.7, 1.0),
  min_child_weight = 1,
  subsample = c(0.7, 1.0)
)

xgb_control <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 3,
  verboseIter = TRUE,
  allowParallel = TRUE,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary
)

set.seed(123)
xgb_tuned <- caret::train(
  label ~ .,
  data = train_df,
  method = "xgbTree",
  trControl = xgb_control,
  tuneGrid = xgb_grid,
  metric = "ROC"
)

pred_labels <- predict(xgb_tuned, as.data.frame(x_test))
pred_prob <- predict(xgb_tuned, as.data.frame(x_test), type = "prob")[, "spam"]
conf_mat <- confusionMatrix(pred_labels, y_test_factor, positive = "spam")

accuracy_1 <- conf_mat$overall["Accuracy"]
precision_1 <- conf_mat$byClass["Pos Pred Value"]
recall_1 <- conf_mat$byClass["Sensitivity"]
specificity_1 <- conf_mat$byClass["Specificity"]
f1_score_1 <- conf_mat$byClass["F1"]
auc_value_1 <- auc(roc(test_data$label, pred_prob))

```

TF-IDF + LASSO
```{r}
model_tfidf <- TfIdf$new()
tfidf_train <- model_tfidf$fit_transform(dtm_train)
tfidf_test <- model_tfidf$transform(dtm_test)

tfidf_train <- as_tibble(as.matrix(tfidf_train)) %>% mutate(Y = train_data$label)
tfidf_test <- as_tibble(as.matrix(tfidf_test)) %>% mutate(Y = test_data$label)

lambda_seq <- 10^seq(-4, 0, length = 20)
lasso <- caret::train(
  Y ~ ., 
  data = tfidf_train,
  method = "glmnet",
  trControl = caret::trainControl("cv", number = 5),
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = lambda_seq),
  preProcess = c("scale")
)

confusion_matrix <- confusionMatrix(predict(lasso, tfidf_test), tfidf_test$Y, positive="1")
accuracy_2 <- confusion_matrix$overall["Accuracy"]
precision_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Pos Pred Value'] 
recall_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Sensitivity']
f1_score_2 <- 2 * ((precision_2 * recall_2) / (precision_2 + recall_2))
specificity_2 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Specificity'] 
predictions <- predict(lasso, tfidf_test, type = "prob")[,2]  
auc_value_2 <- auc(roc(tfidf_test$Y, predictions))

```
GloVe Embedding
```{r}
# Train GloVe
tcm <- create_tcm(it_train, vectorizer, skip_grams_window = 5)
glove <- GlobalVectors$new(rank = 100, x_max = 10)
wv_main <- glove$fit_transform(tcm, n_iter = 20)
word_vectors <- wv_main + t(glove$components)

```

GloVe + LASSO Embedding
```{r}
glove_train <- as_tibble(as.matrix(dtm_train %*% word_vectors)) %>% mutate(Y = train_data$label)
glove_test <- as_tibble(as.matrix(dtm_test %*% word_vectors)) %>% mutate(Y = test_data$label)

lasso_glove <- caret::train(
  Y ~ ., 
  data = glove_train,
  method = "glmnet",
  trControl = caret::trainControl("cv", number = 5),
  tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = lambda_seq),
  preProcess = c("scale")
)

confusion_matrix <- confusionMatrix(predict(lasso_glove, glove_test), glove_test$Y, positive="1")
accuracy_3 <- confusion_matrix$overall["Accuracy"]
precision_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Pos Pred Value'] 
recall_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Sensitivity']
f1_score_3 <- 2 * ((precision_3 * recall_3) / (precision_3 + recall_3))
specificity_3 <- confusion_matrix$byClass['Specificity'] 
predictions <- predict(lasso_glove, glove_test, type = "prob")[,2]  
auc_value_3 <- auc(roc(glove_test$Y, predictions))

```

GloVe Embedding + LSTM
```{r}
tokenizer <- text_tokenizer(num_words = 5600)
tokenizer %>% fit_text_tokenizer(train_data$text)

train_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, train_data$text)
test_sequences <- texts_to_sequences(tokenizer, test_data$text)

seq_lengths <- sapply(train_sequences, length)
max_length <- min(100, quantile(seq_lengths, 0.95) %>% as.integer())

X_train <- pad_sequences(train_sequences, maxlen = max_length, padding = 'post', truncating = 'post')
X_test <- pad_sequences(test_sequences, maxlen = max_length, padding = 'post', truncating = 'post')

num_words <- min(tokenizer$num_words, length(tokenizer$word_index))
embedding_matrix <- array(0, c(num_words + 1, 100))  
for (word in names(tokenizer$word_index)) {
  idx <- tokenizer$word_index[[word]]
  if (idx <= num_words && word %in% rownames(word_vectors)) {
    embedding_matrix[idx + 1, ] <- word_vectors[word, ]  
  }
}

model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_embedding(input_dim = num_words + 1, output_dim = 100, input_length = max_length,
                  weights = list(embedding_matrix), trainable = FALSE) %>%
  layer_lstm(units = 64, dropout = 0.4, recurrent_dropout = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 32, activation = "relu") %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.4) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1, activation = "sigmoid")

model %>% compile(optimizer = optimizer_adam(learning_rate = 0.01),
                  loss = "binary_crossentropy", metrics = "accuracy")

history <- model %>% fit(X_train, y_train, epochs = 50, batch_size = 32, view_metrics = FALSE)

predictions <- model %>% predict(X_test)
predicted_classes <- ifelse(predictions > 0.5, 1, 0)
confusion_matrix <- table(Predicted = predicted_classes, Actual = y_test)

TN <- confusion_matrix[1,1]; FP <- confusion_matrix[2,1]; FN <- confusion_matrix[1,2]; TP <- confusion_matrix[2,2]
accuracy_4 <- (TP + TN) / sum(confusion_matrix)
precision_4 <- TP / (TP + FP)
recall_4 <- TP / (TP + FN)
specificity_4 <- TN / (TN + FP)
f1_score_4 <- 2 * (precision_4 * recall_4) / (precision_4 + recall_4)
auc_value_4 <- auc(roc(y_test, predictions))

```

Comparison Table
```{r}
accuracy_1 <- as.numeric(accuracy_1)        # XGBoost
precision_1 <- as.numeric(precision_1)
recall_1 <- as.numeric(recall_1)
f1_score_1 <- as.numeric(f1_score_1)
specificity_1 <- as.numeric(specificity_1)
auc_value_1 <- as.numeric(auc_value_1)      # ensure pROC AUC is numeric

accuracy_2 <- as.numeric(accuracy_2)        # TF-IDF + LASSO
precision_2 <- as.numeric(precision_2)
recall_2 <- as.numeric(recall_2)
f1_score_2 <- as.numeric(f1_score_2)
specificity_2 <- as.numeric(specificity_2)
auc_value_2 <- as.numeric(auc_value_2)

accuracy_3 <- as.numeric(accuracy_3)        # GloVe + LASSO
precision_3 <- as.numeric(precision_3)
recall_3 <- as.numeric(recall_3)
f1_score_3 <- as.numeric(f1_score_3)
specificity_3 <- as.numeric(specificity_3)
auc_value_3 <- as.numeric(auc_value_3)

accuracy_4 <- as.numeric(accuracy_4)        # GloVe + LSTM
precision_4 <- as.numeric(precision_4)
recall_4 <- as.numeric(recall_4)
f1_score_4 <- as.numeric(f1_score_4)
specificity_4 <- as.numeric(specificity_4)
auc_value_4 <- as.numeric(auc_value_4)

metrics_table <- tibble(
  Model = c("XGBoost", "TF-IDF + LASSO", "GloVe + LASSO", "GloVe + LSTM"),
  Accuracy = c(accuracy_1, accuracy_2, accuracy_3, accuracy_4),
  Precision = c(precision_1, precision_2, precision_3, precision_4),
  Recall = c(recall_1, recall_2, recall_3, recall_4),
  F1_Score = c(f1_score_1, f1_score_2, f1_score_3, f1_score_4),
  Specificity = c(specificity_1, specificity_2, specificity_3, specificity_4),
  AUC = c(auc_value_1, auc_value_2, auc_value_3, auc_value_4)
)
print(metrics_table)
```
